title: Student loans in England: 2024 to 2025
body: "Student loans in England: financial year 2024-25  This publication provides statistics on loan outlays, repayments of loans and borrower activity for English domiciled students studying in higher education (HE) and further education (FE) in the United Kingdom (UK) and European Union (EU) students studying in England.  The figures cover Income Contingent Loans (ICR), which were introduced in 1998/99, for financial years up to and including 2024-25. "
